not_found: Profile not found or not signed in.

messages.twitch_error: Twitch connection failed. Please try again.

details.heading: Edit Profile Details
details.game_profile_link_label: In-Game Profile Link (Steam, Tracker.gg, op.gg, etc.)
details.game_profile_link_hint: Link to your profile on a stats/tracker site for your game - e.g. your Steam Community profile (CS2), tracker.gg (Valorant), op.gg (League of Legends), or ballchasing.com (Rocket League).
details.creator_hint: When enabled, you'll appear with your picture, bio and social links on the public Creators page.
details.is_content_creator_label: I'm a content creator and want to be listed on the Creators page
details.creator_bio_label: Short bio for the Creators page

faceit.heading: FACEIT Profile
faceit.description: Link your FACEIT ID to see your lifetime and per-match stats on the stats page - regardless of whether you're on a team.
faceit.faceit_nickname_hint: Your nickname on faceit.com, exactly as shown there.
faceit.already_linked: Currently linked (FACEIT ID: {{id}}). Search again to change the link.
faceit.public_profile_hint: Picture, name, role and team are always visible to visitors. Your bio and social links only show up if you enable that below.
faceit.show_extended_profile_label: Show bio and social links publicly
faceit.show_extended_profile_hint: Off by default - your linked social media links are only shown publicly with this setting on.

social.heading: Social Media Connections
social.description: Connect your Twitch channel so your follower count is automatically synced for sponsor reporting, instead of an admin maintaining it manually.

reach.heading: My Reach
reach.description: There's no automatic sync (yet) for Twitter/X, Instagram, and TikTok. Enter your numbers yourself, or upload a screenshot (e.g. of your profile or post insights) - the values are read locally and entered as a suggestion, the image itself is never stored anywhere.
